Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce an updated model with new constraints The user gave a dictionary with all constraint types currently only a few constraints present

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We need to add constraints that ensure fairness eg any FinalDecision cannot happen directly after CheckApplicantRace without a ManualReview or BiasMitigationCheck Also ensure ManualReview coexists with decisions for sensitive applicants etc

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Constraints In DECLARE binary constraints are mapping from source activity to target activity with support and confidence

Name: Inductive Reasoning - IND
Text: Given a process model we can add constraints like coexistence If a decision step occurs eg FinalDecision then ManualReview must also occur in the same trace So we add a coexistence between FinalDecision and ManualReview

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Now lets think about the typical loan application process Activities StartApplication FinalDecision RequestAdditionalInfo

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Add response CheckSensitiveAttributes BiasMitigationCheck Add chainresponse CheckSensitiveAttributes BiasMitigationCheck Add nonsuccession CheckSensitiveAttributes Reject Add precedence ManualReview Approve Reject FinalDecision Add coexistence FinalDecision ManualReview

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We must ensure we follow the format Lets write them Well start with the original dict and add new constraints

Name: Ethical or Moral Reasoning - PE
Text: These added constraints reduce bias by enforcing bias mitigation checks and manual reviews before decisions and preventing direct succession from sensitive attribute checks to rejects
